pages.text:
な

Ref: 0017/2004

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE

HIRON DR

IRRINEI

25MM MM23

NO

60|FA/04

The Department of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of South Africa presents its compliments to the Embassy of the Republic of France and has the honour to refer to the Embassy's Note Verbale 31/FA /04 dated 2 March 2004.

The Department of Foreign Affairs has the honour to give notification, as required in terms of Article 13 of the Agreement between the Government of the Republic of South Africa and the Government of the Republic of France, concerning

Defence Cooperation, that the South African Government has complied with all the Constitutional requirements necessary for the Agreement to enter into force.

The Department of Foreign Affairs has the honour to confirm that it is further understood that the Agreement will enter into force on the date of this Note in reply.

It would be appreciated if the Embassy could convey the aforementioned notification to the relevant French authorities.

The Department of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of South Africa avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Embassy of the Republic of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

*

PRETORIA

18 June 2004

The Embassy of France 250 Melk Street

New Muckleneuk

PRETORIA

0001
